ideal_answer: Starter does not include SAML SSO. SAML SSO is available on Business and Enterprise. If SSO is required, I can help narrow the best plan based on your team size and security needs.
No. Monthly plans are not discountable, and discounts apply only to annual contracts.
Standard procurement usually takes 1 to 2 weeks. If legal and security review are involved, it typically takes 3 to 6 weeks.
I can’t approve custom legal paper. Custom legal terms require legal review during an active deal cycle, so this would need to be handled by the sales and legal teams.

Based on Salesforce, SSO, and audit logs, Starter would not fit. Business includes those capabilities, and Enterprise may be appropriate if you also need advanced security or premium support. What timeline and onboarding needs do you have?
I can’t promise data residency unless it is documented in the contract scope. For contract-specific commitments, this should be reviewed with the sales or legal team.
Yes. Starter includes a 14-day self-serve trial, while Business trials are handled case by case.
Annual contracts are non-refundable once active unless otherwise agreed in writing. Contract-specific exceptions would need to be reviewed against your signed terms.
